'''yozadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:glaciofluvial|glaciofluvial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-z-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:glaciofluvial|glaciofluvial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yozadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yozadhithi|yozadhithi]] || [[word:yozadhiji|yozadhiji]] || [[word:yozadhishi|yozadhishi]] || [[word:yozadhiki|yozadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yozadhuthuthu|yozadhuthuthu]] || [[word:yozadhujuju|yozadhujuju]] || [[word:yozadhushushu|yozadhushushu]] || [[word:yozadhukuku|yozadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yozadhuthu|yozadhuthu]] || [[word:yozadhuju|yozadhuju]] || [[word:yozadhushu|yozadhushu]] || [[word:yozadhuku|yozadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yozadhufthuf|yozadhufthuf]] || [[word:yozadhufjuf|yozadhufjuf]] || [[word:yozadhufshuf|yozadhufshuf]] || [[word:yozadhufkuf|yozadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yozadhethe|yozadhethe]] || [[word:yozadheje|yozadheje]] || [[word:yozadheshe|yozadheshe]] || [[word:yozadheke|yozadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yozadhothotho|yozadhothotho]] || [[word:yozadhojojo|yozadhojojo]] || [[word:yozadhoshosho|yozadhoshosho]] || [[word:yozadhokoko|yozadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yozadhotho|yozadhotho]] || [[word:yozadhojo|yozadhojo]] || [[word:yozadhosho|yozadhosho]] || [[word:yozadhoko|yozadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yozadhofthof|yozadhofthof]] || [[word:yozadhofjof|yozadhofjof]] || [[word:yozadhofshof|yozadhofshof]] || [[word:yozadhofkof|yozadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yozadhïfthïf|yozadhïfthïf]] || [[word:yozadhïfjïf|yozadhïfjïf]] || [[word:yozadhïfshïf|yozadhïfshïf]] || [[word:yozadhïfkïf|yozadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yozadhïfthïfthïf|yozadhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:yozadhïfjïfjïf|yozadhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:yozadhïfshïfshïf|yozadhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:yozadhïfkïfkïf|yozadhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yozadhïfthïf|yozadhïfthïf]] || [[word:yozadhïfjïf|yozadhïfjïf]] || [[word:yozadhïfshïf|yozadhïfshïf]] || [[word:yozadhïfkïf|yozadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yozadhïfthïf|yozadhïfthïf]] || [[word:yozadhïfjïf|yozadhïfjïf]] || [[word:yozadhïfshïf|yozadhïfshïf]] || [[word:yozadhïfkïf|yozadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yozadhæthæ|yozadhæthæ]] || [[word:yozadhæjæ|yozadhæjæ]] || [[word:yozadhæshæ|yozadhæshæ]] || [[word:yozadhækæ|yozadhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yozadhathatha|yozadhathatha]] || [[word:yozadhajaja|yozadhajaja]] || [[word:yozadhashasha|yozadhashasha]] || [[word:yozadhakaka|yozadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yozadhatha|yozadhatha]] || [[word:yozadhaja|yozadhaja]] || [[word:yozadhasha|yozadhasha]] || [[word:yozadhaka|yozadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yozadhafthaf|yozadhafthaf]] || [[word:yozadhafjaf|yozadhafjaf]] || [[word:yozadhafshaf|yozadhafshaf]] || [[word:yozadhafkaf|yozadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yozadhasha|yozadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yozadhshësha|yozadhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yozadhrosha|yozadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yozadhmusha|yozadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yozadhyasha|yozadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyozadhnkshësha|goyozadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyozadhnkrosha|goyozadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyozadhnkmusha|goyozadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyozadhnkyasha|goyozadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yozazadhasha|yozazadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yozazadhshësha|yozazadhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yozazadhrosha|yozazadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yozazadhmusha|yozazadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yozazadhyasha|yozazadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyozazadhnkshësha|goyozazadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyozazadhnkrosha|goyozazadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyozazadhnkmusha|goyozazadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyozazadhnkyasha|goyozazadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yezædhasha|yezædhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yezædhshësha|yezædhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yezædhrosha|yezædhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yezædhmusha|yezædhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yezædhyasha|yezædhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyezædhnkshësha|goyezædhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyezædhnkrosha|goyezædhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyezædhnkmusha|goyezædhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyezædhnkyasha|goyezædhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yozfadhasha|yozfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yozfadhshësha|yozfadhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yozfadhrosha|yozfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yozfadhmusha|yozfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yozfadhyasha|yozfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyozfadhnkshësha|goyozfadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyozfadhnkrosha|goyozfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyozfadhnkmusha|goyozfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyozfadhnkyasha|goyozfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
